name: reel_2026-05-12_003
caption:
Buying more containers will never fix your under-sink cabinet.

I tried clear bins. I tried stackable trays. I tried labeling everything. None of it solved the actual problem — that anything past the front 6 inches is functionally lost.

What worked was a Simple Houseware 2-tier sliding basket. Chrome wire, 18 lbs per shelf, and the front rack slides independently to expose the back.

I threw out two bins of duplicate cleaners I'd bought because I forgot the first ones existed. The cabinet finally works.

Comment LINK and I'll DM you the link.
Amazon affiliate — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.
